_snapshot_meta.name: Inbound Synthesis - Explain Callback v0
_snapshot_meta.purpose: Reference snapshot of WF2 captured during MIN-77 work. WF2 is OUT OF SCOPE for MIN-77 (no edits). Snapshot here for reference only.

name: Inbound Synthesis - Explain Callback v0
_chain_summary: Slack Interaction (POST /explain-score) -> Parse Slack Payload (Code) -> Query Signal Events (Postgres, 30d) -> Query Inbound Alert (Postgres, latest, executeOnce) -> Build Scoring Payload + Score (Code, canonical formula, executeOnce) -> Claude Synthesis (Anthropic API, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, 800 tokens, 4-paragraph explanation) -> Send a message (Slack channel reply)
_min77_note: WF2 emits a 4-paragraph THREADED EXPLAIN reply (different surface than WF1's HOT alert). MIN-77 does not modify WF2; the 'Explain this score' button on the redesigned WF1 alert keeps the same action_id='explain_score' + value=account_id contract so WF2 keeps working unchanged.
_full_export_via: Use mcp__claude_ai_n8n__get_workflow_details with workflowId='yU1s6WS1N7vvgEGO' for the full node bodies; this snapshot is metadata only because WF2 is out of scope.
